interview_process_sections.title: Software Engineer Interview Process
interview_process_sections.content:
Our Software Engineer interview process is designed to understand your technical depth, practical skills, and ways of working.

**Stages:**
1. **Online application review** – Our recruiters and hiring managers review your resume and background.
2. **Technical phone screen (1 round)** – 60-minute coding interview focused on data structures, algorithms, and problem-solving.
3. **Virtual onsite (2 rounds)** – One systems design or frontend architecture round and one coding/problem-solving round.
4. **Hiring manager & culture add interview (1 round)** – Discussion about your experience, collaboration style, and alignment with our values.

Most Software Engineer candidates complete **4 interview rounds in total** (1 phone + 2 technical onsite + 1 hiring manager).

interview_process_sections.title: Engineering Interview Process (Non-Software Roles)
interview_process_sections.content:
For hardware, data, and infrastructure roles, we use a streamlined engineering process:

1. **Application & recruiter screen** – Resume review and a 30-minute recruiter call.
2. **Technical interview(s)** – 1–2 rounds focused on role-specific technical skills (e.g., data modeling, SRE scenarios, analytics cases).
3. **Team panel** – Conversation with future teammates about collaboration and projects.

Most candidates for these roles complete **3 interview rounds**, not including the initial application review.

interview_process_sections.title: Non-Engineering Interview Process
interview_process_sections.content:
Our non-engineering interview process emphasizes business impact, communication, and collaboration.

1. **Recruiter phone screen** – 30 minutes to discuss your background and interests.
2. **Hiring manager interview** – Deep dive into your experience, role expectations, and functional skills.
3. **Panel interview** – Conversations with cross-functional partners to assess collaboration and culture add.

Most non-engineering roles have **3 rounds** of interviews in total.

jobs.title: Senior Backend Engineer – Payments
jobs.description: As a Senior Backend Engineer on our Payments team, you will design and build highly reliable services that process millions of transactions per day.
jobs.responsibilities:
- Design, implement, and operate backend services in Go and Kotlin.
- Own end-to-end payment flows, from authorization to settlement.
- Collaborate with product, data, and operations to ship features safely.
- Improve observability, reliability, and performance of critical systems.
jobs.qualifications:
- 5+ years of backend engineering experience.
- Strong experience with typed languages (Go, Java, Kotlin, or similar).
- Experience with distributed systems, event-driven architectures, and SQL/NoSQL databases.
- Previous experience in payments or fintech is a plus.
jobs.benefits_summary: Competitive salary, equity, health benefits, 25 days paid vacation, and flexible hybrid work in San Francisco.
jobs.benefits_other: 401(k) with match, learning budget, commuter benefits.

jobs.qualifications:

- Experience mentoring other engineers.
jobs.benefits_summary: Highly competitive compensation, equity, 20 days paid vacation, and onsite-first culture in San Francisco.
jobs.benefits_other: Health, dental, and vision; fertility benefits; wellness stipend.

jobs.benefits_summary: Competitive salary, 22 days paid vacation, hybrid work from San Francisco.
